summary: Light header bar implementation PASSED. All 13 test cases verified: Light header bar with school name, logo, division, conference, interactions count on light background; Back link navigates to /pipeline; School logo as rounded circle with border; Match score badge (71%) on right side; Compare and Archive icon buttons functional; Archive dialog opens correctly; Risk badges (Roster Tight, Timeline Awareness) below header; Dark PrimaryHeroCard preserved with message preview and Send CTA; Signal chips render correctly; Stage rail REMOVED (count=0); No console errors; Pipeline page no regression; Floating action bar works.
critical_code_review_comments: JourneyPage.js Lines 518-633: New light header bar implementation is clean and well-structured
Header bar uses transparent/light background sitting on page bg as intended
Match score badge shows '71%' in subtle chip style (text-[11px] font-bold, #f8fafc bg, #e7dfd4 border)
Compare and Archive buttons are icon-only with rounded hover states (w-8 h-8 rounded-full)
Risk badges moved to subtle inline placement below header (mt-3 ml-16)
Stage rail (data-testid=journey-header-rail) successfully removed from header
PrimaryHeroCard preserved with dark background for action focus
Signal chips render with proper styling below action card
context_for_next_testing_agent: Light header bar implementation complete. Header = context (light bg), Action card = focus (dark bg). Stage rail removed. All controls are icon-only with rounded hover states. Risk badges are inline below header. Signal chips render below action card.
